title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Bayer India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
